Health Guaranteed

Every puppy comes with a comprehensive 2-year genetic health guarantee

AKC Registered

Family Raised

Puppies raised in our home with love, socialization, and daily enrichment

About Us

About Harris Heritage Cavaliers

Welcome to Harris Heritage Cavaliers, where we specialize in raising healthy, happy, and well-socialized Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppies. Our family has been dedicated to breeding exceptional companions with the utmost care and attention.

Each of our puppies is raised in a loving family environment, ensuring they are confident, well-adjusted, and ready to become the heart of your family. We are committed to the health, temperament, and beauty of every Cavalier we breed.

Puppies Raised in Our Home
Vet Checked & Vaccinated
Health Guarantee Included
Lifetime Breeder Support

Why Us

Why Choose Harris Heritage Cavaliers?

We are dedicated to connecting families with healthy, happy, and loving Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppies.

Healthy Puppies

All our puppies are vet checked, vaccinated, and come with a comprehensive health guarantee.

Family Raised

Our puppies are raised in a family home, ensuring they are well-socialized, confident, and ready for family life.

Lifetime Support

We offer ongoing guidance and support throughout your pet's life. We are always here to help!

Complete Documentation

Each puppy includes vaccination records, health certificates, and AKC registration paperwork.

Our Promise

Every puppy leaves our home with love, proper care, and the foundation for a wonderful life. We treat every puppy as part of our own family until they become part of yours.

500+ Happy Families
10+ Years Experience
100% Health Guarantee
The Difference

Discover the Harris Heritage Difference

What sets us apart is our commitment to raising healthy, well-balanced puppies in a genuine family environment. Every puppy receives individual attention and love from day one.

Raised with love in our home
Complete health documentation
Ongoing breeder support
Ready for their forever family
Contact Us Today
Happy Cavalier Families

What Our Families Say

Real stories from families who found their perfect companion with us.

Sarah M.

Nashville, TN

"Biscuit is the sweetest Cavalier puppy we could have ever wished for. He arrived healthy, happy, and already socialized. The team at Harris Heritage Cavaliers guided us every step of the way with feeding and care. We couldn't be more thrilled."

Adopted Biscuit

Lauren P.

Charlotte, NC

"Daisy has the most incredible temperament. From the moment she arrived home she adapted perfectly and gets along great with the whole family. The process with Harris Heritage Cavaliers was transparent and professional from start to finish."

Adopted Daisy

David & Ana R.

Austin, TX

"Cooper is our little Cavalier and he is pure love. We picked him up at the airport and it was love at first sight. The veterinary documentation was complete and the after-sale follow-up has been excellent."

Adopted Cooper

Christina V.

Denver, CO

"Luna is a beautiful Cavalier with an amazing personality. She's affectionate, playful, and has become the queen of the house. Harris Heritage Cavaliers made the entire process so easy and gave us really useful tips."

Adopted Luna

Eric S.

Portland, OR

"Winston is a Cavalier with incredible energy. He's playful, loving, and has already mastered his training basics. You can tell Harris Heritage Cavaliers raises their puppies with so much love. Best decision I've ever made."

Adopted Winston

Carmen D.

Scottsdale, AZ

"Oliver is a sweet Cavalier puppy who has filled our home with joy. Our kids are absolutely fascinated with him. Harris Heritage Cavaliers delivered all the paperwork and a very complete welcome kit."

Adopted Oliver

Jason T.

Raleigh, NC

"Charlie is an incredible Cavalier with a regal presence. He's intelligent, curious, and has adapted perfectly. The entire process with Harris Heritage Cavaliers was professional and personal. I would recommend them without hesitation."

Adopted Charlie

Mike & Laura H.

Atlanta, GA

"Penny is our Cavalier girl and she is pure love. We picked her up at the airport and it was love at first sight. The transport was impeccable and she arrived calm and healthy. Harris Heritage Cavaliers exceeded all our expectations."

Adopted Penny

Elena B.

San Diego, CA

"Ruby is a gorgeous Cavalier with soft fur and captivating eyes. She's sweet, sociable, and gets along great with our other dog. The experience with Harris Heritage Cavaliers has been fantastic. Personalized attention and incredible follow-up."

Adopted Ruby

Adrian G.

Dallas, TX

"Teddy is a Cavalier with a charming personality. He's calm, cuddly, and loves to snuggle on the couch. The whole process was so easy thanks to Harris Heritage Cavaliers. The genetic quality and socialization are unbeatable."

Adopted Teddy

Peter & Mark A.

Tampa, FL

"Archie is a Cavalier puppy full of energy and mischief. He's our first dog and Harris Heritage Cavaliers guided us through everything as first-time owners. The welcome kit was a huge help. We couldn't be more grateful."

Adopted Archie

Mei L.

Seattle, WA

"Willow is a Cavalier with an incredible character. She's affectionate, sociable, and always seeks human contact. She arrived healthy and with all paperwork in order. Harris Heritage Cavaliers truly cares about every puppy."

Adopted Willow

Yuki N.

Chicago, IL

"We adopted two Cavalier puppies, Milo and Lola, and they are inseparable. They arrived in perfect condition and adapted from day one. The Harris Heritage Cavaliers team organized all the transport flawlessly. They are the joy of our home."

Adopted Milo & Lola

Rob & Daniel F.

Phoenix, AZ

"Bentley is a Cavalier with the most beautiful coat. He's super intelligent and playful, already learned several tricks. You can see the dedication of Harris Heritage Cavaliers in every detail. The whole neighborhood stops to ask about him."

Adopted Bentley

Paul C.

Minneapolis, MN

"Bella is a beautiful Cavalier with a sweet and adventurous character. She's my perfect companion, always by my side. Communication with Harris Heritage Cavaliers was excellent throughout the process. They sent photos and videos before pickup."

Adopted Bella

Fernando & Teresa O.

Houston, TX

"Duke is a Cavalier puppy with an incredible personality. He's affectionate with the whole family and gets along great with the kids. This is our second puppy from Harris Heritage Cavaliers and the experience has been equally wonderful."

Adopted Duke

Valentina R.

Miami, FL

"Sophie is my little Cavalier and she is one of a kind. She has a fascinating personality and is incredibly affectionate. The adoption process was flawless and Harris Heritage Cavaliers gave me total confidence from the very first moment."

Adopted Sophie

Marco J.

Las Vegas, NV

"Henry is a Cavalier with an enormous heart. He's calm, loving, and has a gorgeous coat. Harris Heritage Cavaliers exceeded my expectations with their professionalism and warmth. I'm already thinking about adopting another."

Adopted Henry
Contact

Ready to Adopt a Puppy?

Have questions about our Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppies or ready to bring one home? We would love to hear from you!

Contact Information

Email

harrisheritagecavaliers@gmail.com

Response Time

We typically respond within
24 hours

Location

United States

Our Location

We are a family breeder. For the safety and privacy of our family and our puppies, we do not publish our address. Once you contact us, we will happily share our location and arrange a convenient visit or delivery.

Harris Heritage Cavaliers

Premium Cavalier King Charles Spaniel puppies raised with love in a family home in the USA. Harris Heritage Cavaliers is dedicated to breeding healthy, happy puppies that fill every home with warmth and joy.
